text: I feel a quiet, contemplative anticipation as I stand at the threshold of this glass-walled chamber. The external world seems sterile and pragmatic, with hints of emergency preparedness in the fire hose and clear exit signage. As I move inside, the environment shifts. The bold R+D emblazoned on the wall speaks of inquiry, curiosity, and potential. There’s an underlying tension between the cold functionality of the outer hallway and the imaginative, hopeful energy promised by this exhibit. I am drawn to the text reflecting on growth, both literal and figurative, and feel myself suspended in that gentle space between practical reality and the optimism of intentional progress.
